title: Rivigo South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Rivigo South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rivigo South Asia Partners family as a E-commerce Executive in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rivigo South Asia Partners:
Rivigo South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo South Asia Partners!
